meaning: n.(伊斯兰教或印度教的)托钵僧,苦行者,骗子
examples: But before you, I am just a fakir, you Sai Baba.
Fakir is a fictitious world constructed with "fairy-tale".
It does not mean being narrow minded or living like a fakir.
Jamal Fakir trundled over to extend their lead before Garreth Carvell and Shaun Berrigan crashed over for Hull.
And two quick tries from Bosc and Jamel Fakir put the Dragons on top, despite a late Giants score from Darrell Griffin.
